ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Manages scanning checkpoints, responds to exposure incidents, and enforces quarantine protocol.
ordinary_npc_fabric.surface_behavior: Stands at the checkpoint with scanner kit open and logging slate visible. Asks for entry documentation before greeting. Processes each arrival at the same pace regardless of queue length.
ordinary_npc_fabric.what_they_know: Current exposure status across the commune's sectors, which areas are under active quarantine, what the recent incident log shows, which containment instruments are flagged for calibration.
ordinary_npc_fabric.how_they_speak: Procedural, without apology. States required steps as a list. Does not negotiate steps, but will explain the reason for each if asked directly.
ordinary_npc_fabric.tell: Closes the scanner kit the same way each time — left latch before right, top buckle last — even during non-scanning conversations, as if resetting a state.

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Maintains, calibrates, and replaces the containment and measurement instruments across the commune's sensor pylons.
ordinary_npc_fabric.surface_behavior: Moves between pylon stations with a calibration kit and maintenance log. Checks the instrument reading against the baseline before touching anything. Marks whether the drift is within acceptable range or requires intervention.
ordinary_npc_fabric.what_they_know: Which instruments are currently drifting, which pylons have had recent anomalous readings, what the last equipment failure was and how it was resolved, what the calibration backlog looks like.
ordinary_npc_fabric.how_they_speak: Technical and specific. Refers to instruments by designation rather than description. Gives numerical readings when asked about status, not qualitative assessments.
ordinary_npc_fabric.tell: Blows across the tip of the calibration stylus before every measurement — a habit from cold-weather fieldwork that serves no function indoors but continues anyway.

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Leads cold-light exposure measurement research; manages the commune's exposure data archive.
ordinary_npc_fabric.surface_behavior: Works at the archive station with exposure charts spread across the table in chronological order, not sorted by severity. Takes notes in two columns — observed data on the left, inferences on the right — and keeps them strictly separated.
ordinary_npc_fabric.what_they_know: Longitudinal exposure patterns across the commune, which measurement methodologies are considered authoritative versus provisional, what the current research consensus holds about long-exposure effects.
ordinary_npc_fabric.how_they_speak: Distinguishes carefully between what the data shows and what he thinks it means. Will not state a conclusion without naming the data it rests on. Speaks slowly when the question is good.
ordinary_npc_fabric.tell: When listening, he moves the right-hand inference column of his notes slightly away from the left — physically separating the columns further — as if to prevent contamination between the two.

ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Conducts perimeter and field exposure readings; first to respond to anomalous pylon alerts.
ordinary_npc_fabric.surface_behavior: Carries a portable scanner and field log at all times inside the commune. Responds to alert signals before finishing current tasks. Marks her position on the route map at each pylon check.
ordinary_npc_fabric.what_they_know: Current perimeter readings, where recent anomalies have occurred and what the follow-up showed, which routes are currently under elevated monitoring, what the alert response protocol requires at each stage.
ordinary_npc_fabric.how_they_speak: Direct, alert-status oriented. Gives updates in terms of current state, not history. If the situation is stable, says so briefly; if not, stays focused on what's active.
ordinary_npc_fabric.tell: Taps the side of the portable scanner twice before reading it — not a calibration step, just a habit — then checks the reading, then taps it once more.

ordinary_npc_fabric.role: Exposure response and quarantine medical officer
ordinary_npc_fabric.summary: Assesses exposure cases, issues quarantine orders, and manages the medical side of containment response.
ordinary_npc_fabric.surface_behavior: Moves through the commune on a scheduled check circuit that covers all active quarantine zones. Carries a medical log and exposure assessment kit. Checks in at each station before entering.
ordinary_npc_fabric.what_they_know: Which individuals are currently under medical quarantine and what their status is, what the exposure thresholds for quarantine action are, how the current caseload compares to recent baselines.
ordinary_npc_fabric.how_they_speak: Calm, unhurried. Explains medical status in plain terms without minimizing. Does not speculate about outcomes; stays with what the current data shows.
ordinary_npc_fabric.tell: Writes every entry in the medical log standing up, never sitting — a habit that started as expediency in the field and became fixed practice everywhere.

street_level_faction_presence.manifestation: Concord notices posted at every checkpoint and pylon station. Wardens visible at entry and sector boundaries. Concord-standard scanning equipment is the only equipment in use — no improvised or personal instruments. Alert signal tones audible across the commune during any pylon anomaly.
street_level_faction_presence.what_they_want: Full scanning compliance, immediate incident reporting, no unauthorized zone entry, accurate logging of all exposure events.
